adversarial_check.description: Mandatory phase-level completeness audit beyond the 6 listed commands, per methodology/02_adversarial_tdd.md. Part 1: for every phase-002 feature (011-015), independently confirmed the contract's status is implemented/complete with both validator_mode_a and evaluator_contract_review approvals recorded, the corresponding qa/NNN.json carries verdict=pass (015's own qa verdict correctly not yet on disk, since this is the very QA round producing it), both NNN-verify-* and NNN-qa-* evidence file sets exist on disk, and feature_list_002.json shows status=complete for 011-014 and status=pending for 015 (correctly in-flight). All five features check out OK. Part 2: ran the final full-tree 'bash tools/validate.sh' once more, independently of check 3/5 above -- SUMMARY: 8 passed, 0 failed, exit 0. This round's evidence files (015-qa-01..06.txt and this adversarial file) were captured strictly per methodology/04_tool_driven_state.md Sec 5: exact literal invocation as first line (including a self-contained heredoc for the audit script, with zero /tmp or session-absolute references anywhere), EXIT:<code> as the last line, fully replayable from the repo root -- correcting the 012-014 evidence-format regression logged in feature 014's QA.
